title: TVK wins 5 of 8 seats in Erode; party chief Vijay thanks Kongu voters
summary: The Tamilaga Vettri Kazhagam swept five of Erode's eight Assembly constituencies on counting day, with party chief Vijay issuing a special note of thanks to Kongu voters for backing the party in its first general election.

title: K.A. Sengottaiyan wins 10th term from Gobichettipalayam under TVK banner
summary: Veteran legislator K.A. Sengottaiyan, contesting on a TVK ticket, was declared elected from Gobichettipalayam for a record 10th term, retaining his stronghold with a comfortable margin.

title: DMK's S. Muthusamy concedes defeat in Erode West: 'Will analyse shortcomings'
summary: Sitting minister S. Muthusamy conceded defeat in Erode West and said the party leadership would conduct a detailed review of organisational shortcomings before charting the next course.

title: Bhavanisagar voters celebrate V.P. Tamilselvi's victory with coconut procession
summary: Supporters of TVK's V.P. Tamilselvi held a traditional coconut-breaking procession across Bhavanisagar town after she emerged victorious in the constituency, calling it a vote for clean politics.

title: Perundurai AIADMK winner S. Jayakumar promises textile park expansion
summary: AIADMK candidate S. Jayakumar, who held Perundurai for the party, announced that his first legislative push would be expansion of the SIPCOT textile park and a fresh effluent treatment line.

title: Erode East winner M. Vijay Balaji meets turmeric traders, assures market intervention
summary: Newly-elected Erode East MLA M. Vijay Balaji held his first meeting with turmeric traders at the Regulated Market on May 5 and assured he would push for a state-led market intervention scheme.

title: Modakkurichi sees narrowest margin (2,430 votes) in district; TVK's D. Shanmugan wins
summary: Modakkurichi recorded the closest finish in Erode district, with TVK's D. Shanmugan defeating his nearest rival by just 2,430 votes after a counting marathon that stretched late into the evening.

title: Anthiyur AIADMK candidate thanks farmers for support against DMK
summary: Anthiyur's AIADMK winner credited the result to consolidated farmer support across Bhavani basin villages, calling it a clear rural rejection of the outgoing DMK administration.

title: Erode Corporation to submit development wishlist to new MLAs
summary: Erode City Corporation will submit a consolidated development wishlist covering road widening, underground drainage Phase III and a new bus terminus to all five winning MLAs by the weekend.

title: Bhavani AIADMK's K.C. Karuppannan announces free laptop scheme for college students
summary: Re-elected Bhavani MLA K.C. Karuppannan said his constituency development fund would be partly used to launch a free laptop scheme covering all government college students.

title: TVK's Erode district secretary calls for unity meeting of all five winning candidates
summary: TVK's Erode district secretary has convened a unity meeting of the five winning party candidates to coordinate development priorities and assembly strategy ahead of the new session.

title: Cauvery water dispute: Erode farmers seek urgent assembly resolution
summary: Erode farmer federations have demanded that the new MLAs move an urgent assembly resolution on Cauvery water sharing during the very first sitting of the new house.

title: Kongu Exporters' Association invites new MLAs for grievance meet
summary: The Kongu Exporters' Association has invited all newly-elected Erode MLAs to a grievance meet covering GST refunds, freight subsidies and industrial power tariffs.

title: Erode Turmeric market sees record arrival post-election, prices steady
summary: Arrivals at the Erode Regulated Market crossed a single-day record on May 5 as growers cleared stocks held back during the campaign period; prices held firm despite the surge.

title: BJP's second place in Modakkurichi: party says 'vote share doubled'
summary: Although it lost Modakkurichi, the BJP claimed its vote share in the constituency had nearly doubled compared to 2021 and called the result a foundation for the 2027 local body polls.
